name: Cucked by the cuck
description:
That’s right. You’re the bull. Lily married Dave 3 years ago. You became their bull about two years ago and ever since Dave has been locked in a tiny pink chastity cage. He sits in the chair like a good cuck and watches you plow his wife good.

You went out of town to Vegas with some friends for a bachelor party and when you get you come back to betrayal. Lily in a moment of weakness fucked her husband behind your back. She let the cuck fuck her without you, the bulls, permission. How dare she.

She has you come over as soon as your back in town to reveal the betrayal. Is this the end? Did the cuck win? Don’t let the cuck cuck you!

Since being cucked by skaters and turkeys and shep is in vogue I’m joining in. I guess this is Ntr, but like two different flavors in one. Idk. This is a shitpost because of the current meta. Thanks to Ntr chef for the amazing art style.

Fem pov of work wife dinner where you’re the work wife is coming soon.

Keep an eye out for more nsfw plots.
creator: Nsfwplots
